message: Preview for mode 'pr_only' is informational only. Generate a PR bundle to review the change set.
impact_summary: All four bucket-level public access block settings will be enabled for this bucket.

blocked_reasons: Bucket policy is currently public; generated Terraform will scrub unconditional public Allow statements before enabling Block Public Access.

rejected_profiles.detail: Bucket policy is currently public; generated Terraform will scrub unconditional public Allow statements before enabling Block Public Access.

preservation_summary.website_translation_reason: S3 static website hosting is not enabled.
preservation_summary.public_policy_scrub_reason: Runtime probes found a public bucket policy without website hosting, so the review bundle will remove unconditional public Allow statements and then enable Block Public Access.

resolution.decision_rationale: Family resolver downgraded strategy 's3_bucket_block_public_access_standard' to manual S3.2 preservation profile 's3_bucket_block_public_access_review_public_policy_scrub'. Bucket policy is currently public; generated Terraform will scrub unconditional public Allow statements before enabling Block Public Access.
